## Safety and privacy
- [ ] No eligibility verdict/score/rank language
- [ ] Synthetic data only
- [ ] No secrets or raw PII
- [ ] Prompt-injection boundary preserved
- [ ] Deletion/session behavior unaffected or tested

## Accessibility (UI PRs)
- [ ] Keyboard
- [ ] Visible focus
- [ ] Labels/errors
- [ ] Word + icon status

## Integration
- [ ] PR base is `develop`, not `main`
- [ ] Merged `origin/develop` before PR
- [ ] No unrelated files
- [ ] Handoff note updated
